The Founder's Vision

Built to Rewrite the Rules of the Sky

Yelinhaworld was born from a conviction: that the world deserves an aircraft that fuses the exclusivity of private aviation with the power of commercial scale. We are not iterating on existing designs — we are reinventing what a modern aircraft can be.

Our flagship, the Yelinha1000, is already fully designed. The MVP is complete. With a 47-meter carbon-fiber fuselage, fly-by-wire cockpit, and a 30-year service lifecycle, this aircraft is engineered for generations — not just decades.

We are partnering with the world's top aerospace suppliers and targeting delivery of the first 50 aircraft by 2030, scaling to 2,000+ units annually from our Texas robotized factory by 2036.

Joseph Yelinha Deguenon
Founder & Chief Executive Officer

The Flagship

The Yelinha1000

A non-eVTOL, ultra-luxurious, high-performance aircraft unlike anything in commercial aviation today. Seats up to 80 passengers in private-jet configuration or 300 in full commercial layout — priced at 00M per unit.

Growth Trajectory

Scaling the Future

2026
Official Launch — New York City
Yelinhaworld officially launches in NYC. The Yelinha1000 is unveiled to investors, airlines, and the global aviation community. MVP fully complete.
2028
Texas Factory — First Production Run
Our robotized manufacturing facility in Texas begins full-scale production, with initial supply chain integration across Honeywell, Safran, and Spirit AeroSystems.
2030
First 50 Aircraft Delivered
50 Yelinha1000 aircraft are delivered to initial clients. Revenue generation begins, confirming the commercial viability of the platform.
2036
2,000+ Units Per Year
Full industrial scale achieved. Yelinhaworld becomes a top-tier global aerospace manufacturer, redefining sustainable, intelligent, and luxurious flight worldwide.
Market Opportunity

A Global Market Ready for Disruption

The global commercial aviation market is projected to require over 40,000 new aircraft over the next 20 years. Legacy manufacturers are stretched. The Yelinha1000 enters at the intersection of private luxury and commercial efficiency — a segment with no direct competitor.

Yelinhaworld's Texas factory model — fully robotized, modular, and designed for rapid scaling — positions us to capture market share at a pace traditional OEMs cannot match.

With anti-UV carbon fiber technology, hydrogen-compatible engineering and a 5-year maintenance cycle across a 30-year lifespan, the total cost of ownership for our clients is unrivaled in its class.
